title: 4 PCS Bear in a Box Set, Little Pocket Worry Bear Hug with 4 Hats 4 Cards 4 Box for Family Friends Thinking of You Gifts(White + Pink + Brown + Coffee)
features: Heartfelt Commemorative Gift: Each bear nestles securely in its own gift box, accompanied by a fabric pouch or card bearing a warm message. These thoughtful words let loved ones far away know how much they mean to you
Ultra Soft Pocket Sized Comfort: Crafted from premium plush fabric, this mini comfort bear offers a soft, skin friendly feel that fits in the palm or a pocket

A Palm Sized Hug Full of Love: Designed to bridge distances and convey emotional support, this pocket bear sparks imaginative play while fostering emotional development a gift that comforts and nurtures growth

Versatile Decorative Use: Whether for weddings, birthdays, Christmas decorations, or classroom displays, this bear seamlessly integrates into handbags, desks, bedrooms, or even as a keychain charm. Its charming design adds warmth and whimsy to everyday spaces
A Gift for Every Occasion: An unforgettable present for cherished loved ones of all ages. Birthdays, holidays, long distance relationships, mother's day, or simply as a surprise gift
description: Product description Introducing our adorable bear in a box a heartfelt way to send love and reassurance, no matter the distance. Each little bear comes nestled in a cute box with an uplifting message, offering a symbolic hug whenever it’s needed most. Expertly crafted from hypoallergenic plush, this pocket sized pal is both super soft and portable. Gifting on special occasions or as a spontaneous token of affection, it helps soothe worries and sparks joy. Whether kept in a pocket, bag, or displayed on a desk, this worry bear is a gentle reminder that someone cares. Safety Warning NO
